# Assertion "Initializer access out of range!" in InitListExpr::getInit during Sema of scalar compound literal with nested empty initializer {}

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173599
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-27T22:43:50Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/hWYM746ac

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer


---

### Comment 2 - shafik

The backtrace is not identical but they both go back to clang-17 and they both happen when initializing a pointer. If the fix for the dup does not fix this we can reopen at that time.
